compiled_state.title: [2fbd-f6b8] UPDATE: Add _PLUGIN_ROOT pattern and plugin-self-ref-ok to CLAUDE.md architecture section
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## What to do
Update CLAUDE.md to document the _PLUGIN_ROOT convention and check-plugin-self-ref.sh enforcement hook.

## Edits required

### In the Architecture section (Architectural Invariants or equivalent):
Add a paragraph/rule documenting:
- The `_PLUGIN_ROOT` declaration pattern: `_PLUGIN_ROOT="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)/..}"`
  - Use `${_PLUGIN_ROOT}/` for all sibling-file references in .sh scripts
  - Use `${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/` in markdown skill/agent instructions for runtime file references
- The `# plugin-self-ref-ok: <reason>` suppression annotation for legitimate git-relative patterns (e.g., grep patterns on git diff output)
- Reference to the enforcement hook: `.claude/hooks/pre-commit/check-plugin-self-ref.sh` blocks commits that introduce `plugins/dso` into files under `plugins/dso/`

## Files to modify
- CLAUDE.md (Architecture section)

## testing_mode: UPDATE
